description_long: This is a modern tactical rifle with a digital camouflage pattern covering its entire exterior, designed for urban or woodland environments. The rifle features a modular rail system along the top and sides, allowing for the attachment of various accessories. It has a collapsible or skeletonized stock for adjustable length and reduced weight, and a pistol grip for ergonomic handling. The barrel is relatively short and fitted with a suppressor, indicating a focus on stealth and maneuverability. The magazine is a detachable box type, positioned just in front of the trigger guard. The overall build suggests a lightweight, durable construction, likely using advanced polymers and metals.
description: A camouflaged tactical rifle with a suppressor, modular rails, collapsible stock, and detachable box magazine, designed for stealth and versatility.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, camouflage pattern, suppressor, collapsible stock, and rail system.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the slim profile, rail system, and alignment of the suppressor with the barrel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 0, with clear visibility of the magazine and stock.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the suppressor and barrel opening, with the rail system visible along the top.
